title: Screens UI
scenario: Onboarding flow screens do not match Figma UI design specifications
steps: Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time (or clear app data to reset onboarding).
Observe the first Onboarding screen (Welcome / Get Started).
Swipe or tap 'Next' to proceed through each Onboarding screen in sequence.
For each screen, compare the following UI elements against the Figma design: layout, typography, iconography, button styles, colors, and spacing.
Continue until the final Onboarding screen (e.g., 'Done' or 'Start Using App').
Tap the final action button to exit the Onboarding flow and reach the Home screen.
expected: Every Onboarding screen matches the Figma UI design in layout, typography, iconography, button styles, colors, and spacing.
